title: Watermark
description: Causal context watermark — expresses 'what the sender knew when sending this message'.

kind.description: Watermark type. lamport_clock is MUST-support baseline.

value.description: Kind-dependent value: lamport_clock → integer, vector_clock → object, others → string.

lamport_value.description: Fallback comparison value when kind is not lamport_clock. SHOULD be provided.
